title: haloragis tetragyna
intro: Haloragis tetragyna, also known as the floating fern, is a species of aquatic plant in the haloragid family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Haloragis tetragyna include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
